channel.title: Times Square on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Times Square on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Tony's Di Napoli
item.description: Summary We were around Times Square to watch a Broadway show right in the midst of all the franchise restaurant chains including The Counter, Red Lobster, Olive Garden, etc. Seeing on Yelp how this has over 2000 reviews, maybe a Times Square non-restaurant chain will be pretty good? The proscuitto and burrata was pretty good. It came with a decent amount of slices of proscuitto, olives, 2 big burrata balls, cheese, and some pickled peppers and basil.
